patch.value: Create ONBOARDING.md for new maintainers and first-time contributors

No single 'first two hours' onboarding doc; setup/testing/workflow/release info is scattered across CONTRIBUTING/AGENTS/RELEASING/ARCHITECTURE. Also the right target for the ShareOnboardingGuide tool.

docs/ONBOARDING.md covers prerequisites, first build, safe test runs, real tracker mutation workflow (PM_AUTHOR+claim/update/close), auto-release+same-day release, hard never-do list (no hand-edit CHANGELOG, no manual npm publish, no PM_PATH on real repo), diagnostics, private-ops pointer; linked from README+CONTRIBUTING; docs-skills gate passes.

No single 'first two hours' onboarding doc; setup/testing/workflow/release info is scattered across CONTRIBUTING/AGENTS/RELEASING/ARCHITECTURE. Also the right target for the ShareOnboardingGuide tool.
